name: Case 1
history: Master's degree in engineering and experience in robotics. Past remorse related to not dedicating enough time to a project.
intermediate_belief: If I don't get a response, it means I am not good enough.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will always fail in personal relationships.
coping_strategies: Avoid reaching out to others to prevent rejection.
situation: Sent an email to someone they are interested in dating and received no response.
auto_thought: They are not interested in me because I am not interesting enough.
behavior: Avoids checking email to prevent feeling rejected.
